why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:reset_chat must dispatch from the official framed packet id to an empty-body reset_chat decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for the official singleton empty-body packet only and is separate from chat UI reset behavior, screen flow, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_reset_chat_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 6, official empty body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration clientbound packet id 0x06.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundResetChatPacket.INSTANCE, ClientboundResetChatPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundResetChatPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), and ClientboundResetChatPacket.type().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration clientbound reset_chat dispatch/decode.

Current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound mapping contains cookie_request id 0x00, custom_payload id 0x01, disconnect id 0x02, finish_configuration id 0x03, keep_alive id 0x04, and ping id 0x05, but not reset_chat id 0x06.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x6 in Clientbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration clientbound reset_chat packet id 6
